member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.DateTimeExtensions.ToStringSimple(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Used to be named ApiTime

members.member: Get the name for the enum value

member.summary: Generate rnadom, try not to repeat. Use checksum

member.name: T:AppoMobi.Specials.ObservableRangeCollection`1
member.summary: Represents a dynamic data collection that provides notifications when items get added, removed, or when the whole list is refreshed.

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.ObservableRangeCollection`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the System.Collections.ObjectModel.ObservableCollection(Of T) class.

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.ObservableRangeCollection`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the System.Collections.ObjectModel.ObservableCollection(Of T) class that contains elements copied from the specified collection.
member.param: collection: The collection from which the elements are copied.
member.exception: The collection parameter cannot be null.

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.ObservableRangeCollection`1.AddRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedAction)
member.summary: Adds the elements of the specified collection to the end of the ObservableCollection(Of T).

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.ObservableRangeCollection`1.RemoveRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0},System.Collections.Specialized.NotifyCollectionChangedAction)
member.summary: Removes the first occurence of each item in the specified collection from ObservableCollection(Of T). NOTE: with notificationMode = Remove, removed items starting index is not set because items are not guaranteed to be consecutive.

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.ObservableRangeCollection`1.Replace(`0)
member.summary: Clears the current collection and replaces it with the specified item.

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.ObservableRangeCollection`1.ReplaceRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Clears the current collection and replaces it with the specified collection.

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Reflection.Populate(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: JsonConvert.PopulateObject with ObjectCreationHandling.Replace. This is not raising OnPropertyChanged!!! Use MapProps..

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Reflection.MapProperties(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Set props values with reflection, if fails with sub props use Populate

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Tasks.SetTimer(System.Double)
member.summary: In MS

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Tasks.StartDelayed(System.TimeSpan,System.Action)
member.summary: Start action with delay. Beware this is not garanteed to run on background thread at all.

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Tasks.StartDelayed(System.TimeSpan,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Action)
member.summary: Start action with delay. Beware this is not garanteed to run on background thread at all.

member.name: T:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ILocalize
member.summary: Implementations of this interface MUST convert iOS and Android platform-specific locales to a value supported in .NET because ONLY valid .NET cultures can have their RESX resources loaded and used.
member.remarks: Lists of valid .NET cultures can be found here: http://www.localeplanet.com/dotnet/ http://www.csharp-examples.net/culture-names/ You should always test all the locales implemented in your application.

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ILocalize.GetCurrentCultureInfo
member.summary: This method must evaluate platform-specific locale settings and convert them (when necessary) to a valid .NET locale.

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ILocalize.SetLocale(System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: CurrentCulture and CurrentUICulture must be set in the platform project, because the Thread object can't be accessed in a PCL.

member.name: T:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.PlatformCulture
member.summary: Helper class for splitting locales like iOS: ms_MY, gsw_CH Android: in-ID into parts so we can create a .NET culture (or fallback culture)

member.name: T:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter
member.summary: Defines a type converter for enum values that converts enum values to and from string representations using resources
member.remarks:
This class makes localization of display values for enums in a project easy. Simply derive a class from this class and pass the ResourceManagerin the constructor.
class LocalizedEnumConverter : ResourceEnumConverter { public LocalizedEnumConverter(Type type) : base(type, Properties.Resources.ResourceManager) { } }
Public Class LocalizedEnumConverter
Inherits ResourceEnumConverter Public Sub New(ByVal sType as Type) MyBase.New(sType, My.Resources.ResourceManager) End Sub End Class
Then define the enum values in the resource editor. The names of the resources are simply the enum value prefixed by the enum type name with an underscore separator eg MyEnum_MyValue. You can then use the TypeConverter attribute to make the LocalizedEnumConverter the default TypeConverter for the enums in your project.

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter.#ctor(System.Type,System.Resources.ResourceManager)
member.summary: Create a new instance of the converter using translations from the given resource manager

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter.GetLookupTable(System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Get the lookup table for the given culture (creating if necessary)

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter.GetValueText(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Object)
member.summary: Return the text to display for a simple value in the given culture
member.param: The culture to get the text for
The enum value to get the text for

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter.IsSingleBitValue(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Return true if the given value is can be represented using a single bit

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter.GetFlagValueText(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Object)
member.summary: Return the text to display for a flag value in the given culture
member.param: The culture to get the text for
The flag enum value to get the text for

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter.GetValue(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.String)
member.summary: Return the Enum value for a simple (non-flagged enum)

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter.GetFlagValue(System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.String)
member.summary: Return the Enum value for a flagged enum

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter.ConvertFrom(System.ComponentModel.ITypeDescriptorContext,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Object)
member.summary: Convert string values to enum values

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter.ConvertTo(System.ComponentModel.ITypeDescriptorContext,System.Globalization.CultureInfo,System.Object,System.Type)
member.summary: Convert the enum value to a string

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter.ConvertToString(System.Enum)
member.summary: Convert the given enum value to string using the registered type converter
member.param: The enum value to convert to string
member.returns: The localized string value for the enum

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter.GetValues(System.Type,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Return a list of the enum values and their associated display text for the given enum type
member.param: The enum type to get the values for
The culture to get the text for
member.returns: A list of KeyValuePairs where the key is the enum value and the value is the text to display
member.remarks: This method can be used to provide localized binding to enums in ASP.NET applications. Unlike windows forms the standard ASP.NET controls do not use TypeConverters to convert from enum values to the displayed text. You can bind an ASP.NET control to the list returned by this method by setting the DataValueField to "Key" and theDataTextField to "Value".

member.name: M:AppoMobi.Specials.Localization.ResourceEnumConverter.GetValues(System.Type)
member.summary: Return a list of the enum values and their associated display text for the given enum type in the current UI Culture
member.param: The enum type to get the values for
member.returns: A list of KeyValuePairs where the key is the enum value and the value is the text to display
member.remarks: This method can be used to provide localized binding to enums in ASP.NET applications. Unlike windows forms the standard ASP.NET controls do not use TypeConverters to convert from enum values to the displayed text. You can bind an ASP.NET control to the list returned by this method by setting the DataValueField to "Key" and theDataTextField to "Value".
